fields.description:
ADD: quantity added

REMOVE: typically 0 (or the removed baseline qty if you want to be fancy later)

QTY_OVERRIDE: new final qty

REPLACE: use qty for what’s being added in Phase 3 semantics
fields.label: Qty

fields.description: Human-readable trace: which mapping / expand mode / target caused this
fields.label: Reason

fields.description:
ITEM: document is attached/associated with a specific Item

BOM: document is attached/associated with a BOM

OPTION: document tied to a specific option (useful for option-specific drawings)

MANUAL: freeform entry (external docs, emails, vendor PDFs, etc.)
fields.label: Source Type

fields.description:
ITEM: Item code

BOM: BOM name

OPTION: Option Code or Option Name

MANUAL: freeform identifier
fields.label: Source Name
Document Type
fields.options:
DRAWING
SCHEMATIC
SPEC
WORK_INSTRUCTION
CALIBRATION
SOFTWARE
OTHER

fields.description: Attach file directly to the configuration order if desired.
fields.label: File
